review_title: One stop shop for people management: light, intuitive, engaging
author: Ana D.
pros: Covers performance management impeccably: besides OKRs and formal performance evaluations, you get to give timely and meaningful feedback to colleagues and formally recognize contributions to work environment, culture, team spirit, as well as business results. Peer to peer, manager to individual contributor, top-down, bottom-up: it greatly facilitates open communication and allows for incremental and constant improvements to work done. Dashboard makes it impossible to forget milestones such as quarterly reviews, birthdays, company anniversaries. User experience is friendly, new hires can on-board themselves in no time. In terms of HR Admin work, Mirro has saved a ton of time and countless Excel files have happily been deleted for good: timesheets, contracts, employment documents, leave planning, replacement policies... The Customer Service team is highly responsive and will help with any request in no time.
cons: Being one of the early adopters, I would've loved to see this product go to market sooner.

description: I now have a better overview of everything, including the team’s mood. Mirro helped me switch gears and notice when we need to plan a hackathon or a trip to the Carpathian Mountains for inspiration.
author: Emilia J.
pros: I love the feedback functionality, I see it as the core of the app. Creative people always want to express themselves in any way, shape, or form so providing them with a tool for feedback, suggestions, and praise turned out to be a total game-changer.
cons: It is a very complex app, it takes some time to get used to all the functionality, but the usability is good, you will get there soon.

review_title: Pretty good but still needs some work
description: I think it's definetly an upgrade over previous systems we've used in our company and I actually like it.
author: Alexandru A.
pros: It offers most of the features our company needs. The public Timeline is a really good ideaa along with the kudos system.
cons: It takes a while to get acustomed to all the features mirro has to offer, and the onboarding flow is easily skipable by mistake. There are other problems like text info sometimes not being clear enough but I'm sure they will fix those with time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Above all, Mirro helps us keep connected
description: Mirro helps us be more organised and more connected in a remote environment.
author: Lidia Cristina B.
pros: I love the Kudos feature. It really helps create a more cohesive team spirit when working remote. I also like the interface and how easy it is for me to manage my team's vacation days and cross compare to all the members of the organisation.
cons: I would like to have more options when it comes to evaluations. An option for tables or something more number-friendly would be great.

author: Bogdan Cristi P.
pros: - Easy to use - Multiple onboarding opportunities - A lot of functionalities offered even on the template generation of documents
cons: -The fact that you can not manage the worked hours of the colleagues I manage

author: Diana M.
pros: Easy to use, lots of personalised features and nice celebrating messages.
cons: Nothing to add here, it has all I need for my area

author: Doménica R.
pros: Mirro friendly system has been well received by our employees in Germany, Ecuador, Portugal, France and Brazil. We are now more connected and attentive to all the needs of our employees in request of vacations, medical leaves and work away in the same platform. Is very useful for the simplicity of the procedures that saves time in HR as a great ally. All of this is possible because of their excelent Custumer Experience Team always willing to resolve all our doubts coupling our schedules to get the best performance.
cons: I would like to see full performance of the app after the updates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alexandru S.
pros: - You can have a better view of the organization chart - It's easier to manage holidays and flexi time - It's nice that you can give/receive feedback in an organized environment and the kudos feature can be very beneficial for all the employees
cons: The feedback request pages, both "FOR ME" and "FROM ME", are hard to be used because you can't open the "Perspective" in another tab. If you just click on the button, when you go back, the context is lost and the filters should be set again, which can be annoying sometimes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Mirro was a very good one, I managed to ask for feedback and receive it anytime I wanted.
author: Theodor I.
pros: I love Mirro because it allows us to keep track of our holiday days and see when our colleagues are off. It is also synchronized with Teams, so those will be automatically added to our calendar.
cons: I don't think there is something that should be changed about Mirro. Tho, it would be nice to add more reactions (e.g. love, haha, angry), as Facebook has :D
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Cristina F.
pros: I like the way we interact as a team, supporting each other, but also having fun when someone celebrates something. I also like the transparency of the days off that each colleague has
cons: There is nothing I dislike about this software

description: I love this app, and I also like how fast your team answers when we have a problem we need to fix. Kudos for that!
author: Anca Z.
pros: The design is the best! It's very friendly and colorful, it keeps you in a good mood, and it's making me want to spend more time on the app! Another amazing thing is the fact that we can give each other kudos and feedback, it's very easy to use, and keeps the team engaged. A big plus for the GIFs, we use them all the time in the comment section!
cons: As an admin, I feel like there is room for improvement in the next areas: - export payroll: the excel is great and it has a lot of useful information, but after I download it I have to manually make room to see the names or the days that our colleagues had paid vacation. I am mentioning this because Mirro got us used to a cute and cozy design, and when you download the export, it kinda lowers expectations. - some functionalities are a bit complicated to use: for example, as an admin, if I want to add extra free days, I have to make a lot of steps to make that happen. It would help if I could to that by 2 steps, 2 buttons. - also as an admin, I feel like it would be great to have a better view on the people who took the day off. Right now I have to check it, but maybe if there was a calendar on the right with the names of the people who have the day of, it would be great. - Kudos: this is the best feature, and we like to implement it more within the company, so it would help if we would have a database with specific numbers and dates for the Kudos given/received.

description: Once it was set up, it was easy to manage daily status meeting using Mirro.
author: Edward H.
pros: The ability to put 'sticky' notes on the calendar.
cons: There were issues initially setting up meeting leaders.

description: A pleasant experience, I received help as soon as I asked for it.
author: Badea N.
pros: Information export (employee data and leave centralization)
cons: If a colleague substitutes a substitute for one or more days of leave, that colleague cannot take leave during the same period.

description: Tracking vacation and performance review. Employee recognition and kudos!
author: Indra P.
pros: Software was easy to implement and use. Team was supportive during and after implementation
cons: The team is very proactive with any changes, updates and customization

description: Mirro is an efficient working tool, helping employers track users' activity and also providing great tools for users in order to manage their work, documents, holidays and so on.
author: Denisa C.
pros: It is very easy to use and has efficient features.
cons: It doesn't have the option to pause your activity and restart it at some point later, at least in my case. You can only stop the clock when you check out from work.

description: I like Mirro, it is young, dynamic and friendly but I still think there is room for improvement.
author: Eleonora S.
pros: - the friendly look and ease of use - the stucture because it can be used as na HR tool but also as a performance management tool
cons: - there are still some errors (for instance, some leave requests may show the wrong number of working day and a new requeste must be made) - the performance review should allow you to select grades for the OKRs and make a total in the end - a help manual could be helpful especially when setting okrs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Mirro helps me centralize my documents, CO days and helps me see where I stand at team level
author: Cristina R.
pros: the software is easy to use,we have a record of the days off and th hours of departure and recovery, we have available a centalization of personal evaluations but also at team level
cons: i would prefer to be able to stay logged in without logging out durind the day

description: I like mirro. I think it is a tool that helps a bussines a lot, especially if there are objectives that need to be pursued and measured.
author: Teona-Maria Z.
pros: I really like that I can enter the information quickly, especially the timing part and not only
cons: Sometimes there are times when I have to wait for a certain option to load, but it doesn't happen very often.

author: Monica C.
pros: Great product with a fresh and nice design. Easy to use tool that helps teams align to company objectives and grow a culture of continuous feedback. It saves me time.
cons: I do not consider other features necessary.

author: Silviu S.
pros: Infos about colleagues and vacation days administration
cons: I find the login flow pretty weird, in my opinion.

review_title: A friendly, intuitive and useful HR tool
author: Ramona R.
pros: - easy to use, intuitive- very supportive and well - prepared staff, open to the development suggestions of the software
cons: - it does not have a payroll feature, only pre-payroll
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The problems that we want to solve are team engagement and HR digitalization.
author: Ovidiu C.
pros: The features that we use every day are Kudos and Reporting. We really like that is built around creating a culture of feedback and also the fact that we can link everything with our core values.
cons: The interface is a bit hard to use and it takes a bit of time to get used to it. Also, it would be great to have all the paperwork required by the Romanian law covered.

author: Vaida D.
pros: I really appreciate that this software has a friendly user interface and it can be used for a lots of things like giving or recieving feedbacks from our colleagues, giving kudos, performance evaluations and for more another administration and HR works. A big kudos for all the team members that implement this software and for support team as well, because they always answer to our questions and are very responsive.
cons: I didn't find something that can be improved and i am really happy to use this software daily.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Costica D.
pros: I like the fact that the application simplifies all my HR interactions and provides me clarity for what could be going on with teammates, as it's hard to observe or keep up with changes in a remote environment.
cons: I'm not sure if it's implemented yet or not, but I think one small improvement I could see made is for half-day vacation requests being trackable on site, rather than just taking a full day and mentioning in comments for HR that it's only for half a day.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall the experience was good, but I am still discovering the platform. Hope to use it a lot more from now on.
author: Marinela N.
pros: I likes the most that a lot of important features in the HR life of the organization are here and there is openness from the developers to add things that prove to be usefull for all of their users.
cons: It is harder to clarify the element of vacations, because different companies have different ocazions for which they offers vacation days and if the program they use is different than the one in mirro, there can be errors in loading these days dirrectly in a database.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
